elements.text:
You are invited to a Halloween party with your coworkers and you're only close to a couple of people there. You decide to wear a costume. When you arrive, everyone looks at you. 

Here are some feelings that might happen in the moment:

text: I'm really anxious, but this feeling will pass.
I'm proud of myself for wearing something that I love.
I feel really awkward while everyone stares at me.
I'm worried that others are making fun of me, but if they are, that's their fault for judging me.
I'm excited to show off this costume.
